zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos於大約1116年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár30歲，母親Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary29歲。她和Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas至少有1個女兒。她去世於1189年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos于大约1116年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár30岁，母亲Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary29岁。她和Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas至少有1个女儿。她去世于1189年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Theodora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Theodore  , borne most notably by a 9th-century empress of Byzantium, the wife of Theophilus the Iconoclast. It means ‘gift of God’ the elements are the same as those of   Dorothea  , but in reverse order.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos was born about 1116, in İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, was 30 and her mother, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, was 29. She had at least 1 daughter with Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas. She died after 1189.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos est née environ 1116, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas. Elle est décédée après 1189.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos um 1116 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár 30 und ihre Mutter Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary 29. Sie hatte mit Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1189.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos è nata il circa 1116 nel İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas. Morì dopo il 1189.

ja.Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Magyarorsz: ハンガリーコムaロム-エスズテルゴムエスズテルゴム
ja.Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey: オスマン帝国イスタンブルイスタンブル
ja.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenosが約1116年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császárは30歳，母Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungaryは29歳であった。彼女はManuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémasとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1189年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos(이)가 대략 1116년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1189년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos nasceu aproximadamente 1116, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas. Ela faleceu após 1189.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos родилась около 1116 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, 29. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas. Она умерла после 1189 г.

sm.ABT 1116–AFT 1189: e tusa o le 1116–ina ua ma'ea le 1189

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess of Byzantine Theodora Comnenos nació aproximadamente 1116, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Manuel Anémas Panhyperprotosébastypertate, Anémas. Murió después de 1189.
